test_1_onboarding.name: New Developer Onboarding
test_1_onboarding.details: The system successfully provided relevant information and resources for new developers, including access to the code repository and documentation.

test_2_change_impact.name: Change Impact Analysis
test_2_change_impact.details: The system accurately analyzed the impact of changes made to the codebase, identifying affected components and potential risks.

test_3_mystery_code.name: Mystery Code Explanation
test_3_mystery_code.details: The system provided clear and concise explanations for mystery code snippets, including context and functionality.

test_4_technology_decision.name: Technology Decision Query
test_4_technology_decision.details: The system effectively answered technology-related questions, providing relevant information and recommendations for tooling and implementation.

test_5_unclear_question.name: Unclear Question Handling
test_5_unclear_question.details: The system successfully handled unclear or ambiguous questions, requesting clarification or providing relevant information to aid in understanding.

recommendations: Continuously monitor and update the knowledge graph to ensure accuracy and completeness
Implement additional testing and validation for edge cases and unclear questions
Consider integrating with other tools and systems to enhance functionality and user experience
